name: Event_Tick
code:
name = "Event_Tick"
inputs = {"tick_rate":"int"}
outputs = {"exec_out":"exec","delta_time":"float"}
def process(tick_rate):
    # Event_Tick fires every frame at the specified tick rate (Hz)
    # Default: 30 Hz (safe default, not 60)
    # WARNING: Heavy operations in Tick can freeze your graph!
    # Consider using Timer or Timeline nodes for most use cases.
    #
    # tick_rate: Target ticks per second (10, 30, 60, etc.)
    # delta_time: Time since last tick in seconds
    #
    # The actual tick handling is done by the runtime.
    # This node just defines the interface.
    rate = tick_rate if tick_rate and tick_rate > 0 else 30
    delta = 1.0 / rate
    return ('exec_out', delta)
warning: Heavy operations in Tick can freeze your graph. Consider Timer or Timeline nodes instead.
